zh.lifeSummary: 當Capt John Barton於1434年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安利思時，他的父親Andrew Barton14歲，母親Margaret Prestoun11歲。他和Elizabeth Crawford至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1476年在葡萄牙利斯波亞易格亞 奧 克里斯托弗 E 奧 洛倫佐享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Capt John Barton was born in 1434, in Leith, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Andrew Barton, was 14 and his mother, Margaret Prestoun, was 11. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Crawford. He died in 1476, in Igreja São Cristóvão e São Lourenço, Lisbon, Portugal, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Capt John Barton est né en 1434, à Leith, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Andrew Barton, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Margaret Prestoun, avait 11 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Crawford. Il est décédé en 1476, à Igreja São Cristóvão e São Lourenço, Lisboa, Portugal, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Capt John Barton(이)가 1434년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Barton(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Prestoun(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Crawford(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 포르투갈 리스보 익레자 스a오 크리스트o브a오  스a오 루렌c오에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
